title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Oily Hair
description: Santalum album essential oils contains a compound called alpha-pinene, which is known for its ability to balance oil production in the scalp. Another key constituent, beta-pinene, has a tightening effect on hair follicles, helping to minimize excessive oil secretion. Santalum album essential oils also contains santalol, a compound that has a calming effect on the scalp, reducing irritation and inflammation that can contribute to oily hair.
